title: Warm Circuit Shuffle
prompt: Create an original UK garage R&B track at 130 BPM in A minor, clean and public-safe. Groove: a shuffled 2-step bounce with syncopated kick placement. Drums: snappy snare, swung hats, rim clicks, soft claps. Bass: use a rounded sub line that answers the vocal texture. Instruments: electric piano chords, organ stabs, glassy pads, small synth plucks; add original samples like original breathy vocal chops. Vocal texture: silky R&B lead texture with airy harmonies; no lyric writing, violence, hate, or explicit content. Structure: intro, verse/section A, pre-chorus/build, chorus/drop, bridge/breakdown, final lift, outro. Build adds additional percussion, harmony doubles, chorus brings a memorable clean hook, fuller drums, bridge uses stripped drums, bass pauses. Production: warm saturation, subtle stereo movement. Mix/master: clean loudness, controlled sub, smooth highs.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, copied garage hooks, uncleared vocals, harsh wobble bass, straight house beat, explicit lyrics, trap clutter, muddy sub, brittle snares
